NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on this 1st day of October 2023 by and between Dr. Alice Tan, NRIC No. S2345678G, residing at 123 Orchid Lane, Singapore 123456, and Tech Innovations Pte. Ltd., a company incorporated in Singapore with UEN T12LL3456A, having its registered office at 456 Tech Avenue, Singapore 654321.

1. Confidential Information: Dr. Alice Tan agrees to disclose certain confidential information to Tech Innovations Pte. Ltd. for the purpose of evaluating a potential business relationship. "Confidential Information" shall include, but not be limited to, business plans, financial data, and proprietary technology. Disclosure of project status and project plan details is explicitly excluded from this Agreement.

2. Obligations of the Receiving Party: Tech Innovations Pte. Ltd. shall not disclose any Confidential Information to third parties without prior written consent from Dr. Alice Tan. All Confidential Information must be stored securely. Any breach of confidentiality will result in liabilities as deemed appropriate under Singapore law. For inquiries, please contact Dr. Alice Tan at +65 9876 5432 or via email at alice.tan@example.sg.

All communications regarding this Agreement should reference the SPA and be directed to https://example.sg/contact/S2345678G.
